name: Onion and Parsley Dinner Rolls - Menu #1
recipeIngredient: 16 ounces Box Pillsbury Hot Roll Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat 12 muffin cups with nonstick cooking spray.
2. In a skillet, melt butter over medium heat. Set aside 2 tablespoons.
3. To the skillet, add onion and cook until tender, about 8 minutes. Remove from heat and stir in parsley, salt, and pepper.
4. In a large bowl, combine hot roll mix with yeast packet. Stir in hot water, 1 egg, onion mixture, and reserved butter until dough begins to pull away from sides of the bowl.
5. On a lightly floured work surface, knead dough until smooth and elastic, about 5 minutes. Cover and let rest for 5 minutes.
6. Divide dough into 12 equal pieces. Divide each piece into thirds and form into balls. Place 3 balls in each muffin cup. Cover and let rise in a warm place until doubled in size, 20 to 30 minutes.
7. Preheat oven to 375°F. Combine remaining egg with 1 tablespoon water. Brush rolls with some of the egg mixture. Bake for 15 to 20 minutes, or until golden.
8. Ready to serve in 1 hour and 30 minutes.
